name: SYSAGE Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: SYSAGE Technology Co., Ltd. provides ICT solutions in Taiwan. The company offers planning and system integration services for corporate network establishment, network system security, network management, and data processing analysis and backup system; and provides related technical consultation, and education and training courses, as well as professional services, such as corporate networks solutions, as well as develops professional application software solutions. It also provides network and system software and hardware products from Cisco, Oracle, and IBM; develops solutions for agent products; and plans the network hardware architecture, host system, network security mechanism, database, and related enterprise application software for customers. The company was founded in 1998 and is based in Taipei City, Taiwan.
